news_items.headline: LIVE: Pirates, Blue Jays clash on Peacock
Soto (illness) scratched from Mets' lineup vs. Marlins
Dodgers bullpen scoreless streak sets franchise record
news_items.summary: The Dodgers have asked a lot of their relievers over the last two weeks, and so far they’ve been up to the task. The bullpen covered the last four innings of Saturday’s win in Milwaukee without giving up a run, and have now pitched 36 scoreless innings in a row, breaking the modern franchise record. […]

news_items.headline: Messinger delivering for RailRiders out of the bullpen
news_items.summary: After a rough start, the reliever has not yet allowed a run in the month of May.

news_items.headline: Game #53: Pittsburgh Pirates vs. Toronto Blue Jays
news_items.summary: The Pirates are on the road looking to grab a win today.

news_items.headline: Martín Pérez starts another Sunday rubber match for Braves vs. Nationals
news_items.summary: For the third straight Sunday, a Braves series is on the line.

news_items.headline: Astros vs Cubs Prediction, Picks & Odds for Today's MLB Game
news_items.summary: Our Astros vs. Cubs predictions expect Shota Imanaga to contain the Yordan Alvarez-less Astros this afternoon.

news_items.headline: Brad Lord is the ultimate glue guy for the Washington Nationals
news_items.summary: Brad Lord is a huge weapon for the Nationals in a multi-inning relief role and we saw the best of him yesterday

news_items.headline: Happ gets day off, PCA batting leadoff for Cubs
news_items.summary: The Cubs are giving struggling left fielder Ian Happ the day off while moving center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong up to the leadoff spot for Saturday's game against the Astros.

news_items.headline: Astros DH Alvarez exits in sixth with back spasms
news_items.summary: Houston designated hitter Yordan Alvarez left Saturday's 3-0 victory over the Chicago Cubs in the middle of an at-bat in the sixth inning because of a back spasm and will miss the series finale as the Astros try for a sweep Sunday at Wrigley Field.

news_items.headline: Springer, Jays hand Skenes second straight loss
news_items.summary: George Springer hit his 65th career leadoff home run and the Blue Jays sent Paul Skenes to losses in consecutive starts for the first time this season Saturday.

news_items.headline: Hernandez drives in 6 runs keying Dodgers' rout
news_items.summary: Teoscar Hernández homered and matched a career high with six RBIs in the Dodgers' 11-3 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Saturday night.

news_items.headline: Irvin, Nats combine on 1-hitter to shut out Braves...
news_items.summary: Washington right-hander Jake Irvin pitched five hitless innings for his first win in nearly two months, a 2-0 victory over Atlanta, but he felt a bit of tightness on his final few pitches in the fifth before turning the game over to the Nationals bullpen.

news_items.headline: Cards' Torres, 28, homers in emotional MLB debut
news_items.summary: Four years after considering retirement, Bryan Torres made it to the major leagues at age 28 and homered for the St. Louis Cardinals in his debut.

news_items.headline: Manzardo's pinch-hit HR saves Williams' 11-K gem
news_items.summary: Gavin Williams matched Phillies ace Cristopher Sanchez with eight scoreless innings before Kyle Manzardo delivered a pinch-hit homer in the ninth inning to lift the Guardians to a 1-0 victory.
